schema_note: Hybrid agent — Copilot Studio + Power Automate + Azure Function
name: Passwordless Rollout Planner
description: Multi-phase hybrid agent combining Copilot Studio conversational interface, Power Automate orchestration, and Azure Function compute to plan and execute passwordless authentication rollouts across the organization.

conversation_starters.text: What percentage of our users are ready for passwordless?
Generate a phased rollout plan for FIDO2 security keys
Which users are blocked from passwordless by legacy app dependencies?

components.copilot_studio: Conversational interface for readiness queries and rollout planning
components.power_automate: Orchestration of registration campaigns, reminder flows, and reporting
components.azure_function: Compute-intensive readiness assessment across all users + auth method compatibility checking
